title: Shulkerised
description: You dont want to Kill the Enderdragon but still Want the items? Here is the Solution! | Craftable Shulkers
body:
# Shulkerised!
The Data Pack that Makes the End Worthless.

## Had you ever had the Problem 
that you have a World but you dont want to Figth the Enderdragon or go into the End At all? then this littel datapack is the solution!

**This Data Pack adds the Feature to build Shulker boxes with 8 Chests in a Crafting Tabel!**

---
